series_metadata.series_description: Documents pertaining to the partnership non-paid volunteers (externs), which demonstrate proof of partnership. Records include, but are not limited to, proof of enrollment, Ohio civil service application and/or resume, externship agreement, policy acknowledgments, and paperwork required by school (if applicable), and correspondence.

retention_rules.trigger_desc: Electronic: from start date. ; Paper: from start date, unless scanned and saved electronically
